# Genie.ph: AI-Powered Custom Cake Marketplace in Cebu

> [Genie.ph](https://genie.ph) is the Philippines' first AI-driven marketplace for custom cakes, specifically serving Cebu City and surrounding metropolitan areas. It connects customers with artisan bakers and provides instant, AI-powered price estimations from uploaded design photos.

## Main Sections

- [Home / Marketplace](https://genie.ph/): Browse trending designs and upload photos for instant pricing.
- [Cake Design Gallery](https://genie.ph/collections): Browse 7,000+ custom cake designs organized by category.
- [Customizable Designs](https://genie.ph/customizing/): Deep-links to AI-analyzed designs ready for personalization.
- [Cake Price Calculator](https://genie.ph/cake-price-calculator): Direct tool for AI analysis of custom cake designs.
- [About Genie.ph](https://genie.ph/about): Our mission to digitize the local baking industry in Cebu.
- [Cake Ordering Guide](https://genie.ph/how-to-order): Step-by-step instructions on ordering custom cakes online.
- [Best Cake Shops in Cebu](https://genie.ph/best-cake-shops-cebu): Top 10 comparison of Cebu bakeshops for birthday cakes, wedding cakes, ube cake, premium cafe cakes, and moist chocolate cake.
- [Custom Cake Cebu Guide](https://genie.ph/blog/custom-cake-cebu-guide-2026): Comprehensive pricing guide for custom cakes in Cebu (₱350–₱15,000+).
- [Cake Blog](https://genie.ph/blog): Updates on cake trends, pricing guides, and baker highlights in the Philippines.
- [FAQ](https://genie.ph/faq): Common questions about ordering, pricing, delivery, and customization.

## Key Facts

- **Catalog**: 7,000+ custom cake designs available for instant AI pricing.
- **Rush Orders**: Simple designs can be ready in 1–4 hours with select bakers.
- **Products**: Birthday Cakes, Wedding Cakes, Custom Bento Cakes (from ₱350), Cupcakes, Personalized Gifts.
- **Pricing**: Bento cakes ₱350–₱600, 6" round ₱700–₱1,200, 8" fondant ₱1,500–₱3,000, 2-tier ₱2,500–₱5,000, wedding ₱5,000–₱15,000+.
- **Award**: 1st Place Winner — Startup Innovation Summit, Mandaue City (MIPTAC/MCCI).
- **Founded by**: Alan Paris Caballes.
- **Location**: Park Tower One, Cebu Business Park, Cebu City, Cebu 6000, Philippines.
- **Core Technology**: AI Image Synthesis (Gemini/GPT vision models), Automated Pricing Logic, Real-time Baker Notifications.

## Technical Specifications

- **AI Engine**: Uses advanced vision models (Gemini/GPT based) to analyze cake complexity, size, and decorations to provide instant price estimates.
- **Merchant System**: Integrated dashboard for local homebakers and established cakeshops.
- **Payment Stack**: Supports GCash, Maya, and secure credit card payments via local gateways.

## Service Areas (Cebu, Philippines)

- **Cebu City**: All major barangays and commercial districts.
- **Mandaue City**: Central and industrial zones.
- **Lapu-Lapu City**: Mactan Island and resort areas.
- **Talisay City**: Southern metropolitan Cebu.
- **Other Areas**: Liloan, Consolacion, and Minglanilla (Select merchants).

## Contact

- **Email**: hello@genie.ph
- **Support**: support@genie.ph
- **Phone**: +63-908-940-8747
- **Socials**: [Facebook](https://web.facebook.com/geniephilippines), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/genie.ph/), [TikTok](https://www.tiktok.com/@genie.ph), [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@genieph).

## For Developers & Partners

- **Merchant Portal**: [pro.genie.ph](https://pro.genie.ph)
- **Design Pattern**: `https://genie.ph/customizing/{slug}` - Resource-specific pages for individual cake designs with embedded AI analysis metadata.
- **API Access**: Internal-only, contact support@genie.ph for integration inquiries.

## /customizing/* Agent Notes

- Use `/customizing/{slug}` for interactive cake configuration tied to a single analyzed design.
- Prefer the page-level `customizer-agent-model` JSON payload over scraping button styling or reconstructing state from multiple DOM fragments.
- Read these fields first: `selection`, `options`, `pricing.displayedPrice`, `constraints.availabilityClass`, `constraints.leadTimeLabel`, and `constraints.minimumLeadTimeDays`.
- Required configuration fields before purchase are `cakeType`, `cakeSize`, `cakeThickness`, `flavors`, and `icingBase`.
- When present, `customizer-capability-map` describes the `configure_custom_cake` contract. Use that schema instead of guessing request shape from the UI.
- Do not infer delivery-slot availability from this route alone. Final delivery date, address, and slot validation still happens in cart and checkout.

## Updated

2026-06-19
